name: AAOS Annual Meeting
indexed: Publication depends on downstream manuscript; abstracts are conference proceedings, not guaranteed PubMed indexing.
acceptance_strategy: Poster/ePoster usually more attainable than podium.

name: Orthopaedic Research Society Annual Meeting
deadline_label: Regular abstract submission closes; late-breaking window Oct 12–Nov 9, 2026
indexed: Excellent research visibility; PubMed indexing requires full manuscript publication.
acceptance_strategy: High-volume posters make this a practical target for research projects.

name: American Association for Hand Surgery Annual Meeting
indexed: Publication depends on subsequent manuscript submission.
acceptance_strategy: Specialty meeting with paper and poster formats; likely more approachable than broad national podium slots.

name: Scoliosis Research Society Regional Scientific Meeting
indexed: Publication depends on downstream manuscript; meeting abstracts are not a substitute for indexed publication.
acceptance_strategy: Regional focus may help if author team aligns with region requirements.

name: Society of Military Orthopaedic Surgeons Annual Meeting
indexed: Publication depends on subsequent manuscript submission.
acceptance_strategy: Good target for resident/fellow and military-relevant projects.

name: AOA Annual Leadership Meeting / Summer CORD Conference
deadline_label: Abstract and poster submission window closes
indexed: Best for education/leadership dissemination; full manuscript needed for indexing.
acceptance_strategy: Good fit for education, workforce, and residency projects.

name: Lumbar Spine Research Society Annual Meeting
indexed: Publication depends on downstream manuscript submission.
acceptance_strategy: Highly targeted lumbar spine audience; poster format may be approachable.

name: POSNA Annual Meeting
deadline_label: Deadline not yet detected; monitor weekly
indexed: Publication depends on downstream manuscript submission.
acceptance_strategy: Pediatric subspecialty meeting; consider poster if available.

name: SICOT Orthopaedic World Congress
deadline_label: Monitor for next open abstract cycle
indexed: International visibility; PubMed indexing requires full manuscript.
